name: Chili Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the softened cream cheese on the bottom of a 9-inch pie plate or quiche dish.
2. Spread the chili over the cream cheese.
3. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the chili.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
5. Serve with tortilla chips. Garnish if desired.
